docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $394.00 FILED BY SESSION, SONYA AS TO DEFENDANT DE WOLF REALTY CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SESSION, SONYA AS TO DEFENDANT DE WOLF REALTY CO.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-05-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DE WOLF REALTY CO.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) WILLIAM TALMAGE FILED BY DEFENDANT DE WOLF REALTY CO.
STIPULATION TO USE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY SESSION, SONYA DE WOLF REALTY CO.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAWN PAYNE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SONYA SESSION IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DE WOLF REALTY CO. (WILLIAM TAMALGE) IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SESSION, SONYA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DE WOLF REALTY CO. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HER BURDEN OF PROOF TO SHOW THAT MONEY WAS OWNED TO HER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2025 - JUDGMENT.
